ip_outcome_note: Card name contains 'Master Roshi' explicitly. Depicted figure matches Roshi's canonical visual identifiers: short stocky elderly build, large white beard, wide-brimmed hat, dark sunglasses, and patterned Hawaiian-style shirt. These five co-occurring features are unique to Master Roshi within Dragon Ball canon. Card's oracle text also references an interaction with 'Master Shen, Martial Meister' — Roshi's canonical rival — further confirming identity. Verified.

trivia_bullets.text: Master Roshi, Martial Meister (TB2-057) is a yellow-color Uncommon Battle card (1 yellow energy, 6,000 power, 5,000 combo). It carries Barrier (cannot be targeted by opponent skills) and an Activate Main ability: once per turn, switch a Master Shen, Martial Meister in the Battle Area to Rest Mode to draw 1 card. The Roshi/Shen rivalry is built directly into the card's mechanic — Roshi exhausts his rival to gain advantage.
sources: WebSearch: TCGPlayer TB2-057 Master Roshi Martial Meister

trivia_bullets.text: Master Roshi (the Turtle Hermit) competed in the 21st and 22nd World Martial Arts Tournaments under the alias 'Jackie Chun' — wearing a wig to avoid recognition by his students. His motive was to ensure his students (Goku, Krillin) would lose, believing easy victory would cause them to stop improving. At the 22nd tournament he forfeited against Tien Shinhan rather than risk injury that would expose his identity.
sources: WebSearch: CBR 'Dragon Ball: How Master Roshi Got the Nickname Jackie Chun'

trivia_bullets.text: Roshi's Barrier keyword makes him unusually resilient for a 6,000-power Uncommon — opponent skills cannot select him. Pairing with Shen (also from TB2) as a draw engine mirrors how Roshi and Shen as rival teachers defined the original Dragon Ball tournament meta, with their students' fates intertwined across multiple Tenkaichi Budokai.

related_cards.name: Future Martial Artist Son Goku
related_cards.note: Goku is Roshi's student; TB2-052 and TB2-057 share teacher-student lore link and World Tournament trait.

related_cards.name: Toughened Up Krillin
related_cards.note: Krillin is also a Turtle School student under Roshi; same set.

related_cards.name: Announcer, Ever-Curious
related_cards.note: Roshi competed in the 21st Tenkaichi Budokai where the Announcer has hosted every tournament; both are set-defining supporting cast.
